name: Spells and Bells
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in warm water.
2. Beat together eggs, cream, vanilla, and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Stir in the dissolved yeast.
4. Blend dry ingredients; mix until dough is soft and easy to handle for rolling.
5. Divide the dough into two halves.
6. Roll out both halves to 1/3 inch thick on a floured board.
7. Cut with Christmas cookie cutters (star, bell, tree, etc.).
8. Fry in deep fat heated to 375 degrees until brown.
9. Drain on absorbent paper.
10. Serve plain, sugared, or glazed.
